  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

J66-D66 Régulée

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 29
Func Name: Climatisation

Requests

    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "218C",
    "name": "AC cycle ON",

  {
    "minbytes": 30,
    "sentbytes": "2192",
    "name": "Para2",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "+ACC voltage": {
        "firstbyte": 27,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Actual air distribution flap position": {
        "firstbyte": 22,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Actual air mix flap position Driver": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Actual air mix flap position Passenger": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Air distribution mode": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Air Flow": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Calculated air distribution flap position": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Calculated air mix flap position Driver": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Calculated air mix flap position Passenger": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Calculated compressor status": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Calculated recirculation flap position": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Fan air flow from manual settings": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Fan control mode": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Fan Speed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Recirculation mode": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Thermostat signal": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "218D",
    "name": "PBE ON",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "ref": true
      }
    }

        "ref": true

        "ref": true,

        "ref": true,

    "minbytes": 3,

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      }

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "sortie": {

        "ref": true
      }

  },

    "sentbytes": "30870000",

    "minbytes": 1,

        "ref": true

  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "31A000",
    "name": "Start routine",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Self learning": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "82",
    "name": "Stop communication",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 18,
    "sentbytes": "2185",
    "name": "Switch information",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "A.C": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Ambient temperature sensor": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "AUTO": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "BI-LV": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "D TEMP-": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "D TEMP+": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DashBoard": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DEF-CV": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Engine RPM": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FAN-": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FAN+": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FLOOR1": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FRONT1": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Incar temperature sensor": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "P TEMP-": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "P TEMP+": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "REC": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Sun sensor driver": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Sun sensor passenger": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Switches": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vehicule speed": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Water temperature sensor": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "System Identification",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Calibration number": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Direct control of compressor": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "HW number": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "MATRA reference code": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "PBE": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Reference sub-index": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Reserved": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Supplier reference code": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SW number": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "System configuration bit mask": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Thermostat": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Type of vehicule": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Version number": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 5,
    "sentbytes": "21B0",
    "name": "Vehicule construction date",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "DD.": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "MM.": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "YY.": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }

  },

    "minbytes": 1,

        "bitoffset": 7,

        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
